1.description: get kommunenummer and geometry for Trondheim municipality

2.description: inspect distinct skredrisikokvikkleireklasse values in utlopomr

3.description: inspect lookup table for skredrisikokvikkleireklasse identifiers/descriptions

4.description: select utlopomr polygons with the chosen high-risk class (reduce national layer by class)

5.description: reduce the chosen kvikkleire polygons to those intersecting Trondheim municipality geometry

6.description: select buildings in Trondheim (by kommunenummer) with geometry and bygningid

7.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced kvikkleire polygons

8.description: collapse to one row per bygningid (deduplicate buildings)

-- STEP 4: query [kvikkleire]

-- STEP 5: spatial_join

-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

SELECT objid, bygningid, representasjonspunkt FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning WHERE kommunenummer = '5001';
